name: telugu_smoke
description: 10 Telugu test utterances for Sprint 1 baseline sanity check. Short, diverse, covers core categories. The full 300-utterance golden set is composed in Sprint 2.

utterances.text: అబ్బా! ఎంత అందంగా ఉందో ఈ సాయంత్రం!
utterances.transliteration: abbaa! entha andangaa undhoo ii saayantram!
utterances.english_gloss: Wow! How beautiful this evening is!

utterances.text: విశ్వవిద్యాలయంలో చదువుకుంటున్నప్పుడు నేను చాలా విషయాలు నేర్చుకున్నాను.
utterances.transliteration: vishwavidyaalayamloo chaduvukunTunnappudu nenu chaalaa vishayaalu nerchukunnanu.
utterances.english_gloss: When I was studying at the university, I learned many things.
utterances.notes: Contains vishwavidyaalayamloo (university + locative) and chaduvukunTunnappudu (study + reflexive + continuous + temporal) — strong agglutination test.

utterances.text: మా CEO ఈ quarter కి మంచి presentation ఇచ్చారు.
utterances.transliteration: maa CEO ii quarter ki manchi presentation ichchaaru.
utterances.english_gloss: Our CEO gave a good presentation this quarter.
utterances.notes: English terms (CEO, quarter, presentation) mid-sentence — tests code-switching and script-mixing.

utterances.english_gloss: A big event is happening in Hyderabad on January 26, 2026.
utterances.notes: Mixed native and English digits, named entity (Hyderabad).

utterances.english_gloss: We extend a heartfelt welcome to our honourable guests.
Hey, shall we go to the movies tomorrow?
A Kshatriya preserves the tradition of cosmic knowledge.
utterances.notes: Conjunct-heavy: క్ష, సృ, జ్ఞ, ర్ర, ంప్ర — stresses the phoneme inventory.

utterances.text: మా తాతయ్య ప్రతి సాయంత్రం వరండాలో కూర్చుని, తన చిన్నతనంలో జరిగిన కథలు చెప్తూ ఉంటారు, మరియు మేము అందరూ కలిసి ఆసక్తిగా వినేవాళ్లం.
utterances.transliteration: maa taatayya prati saayantram varandaaloo kuurchuni, thana chinnathanamloo jarigina kathalu cheptuu unTaaru, mariyu meemu andaruu kalisi aasaktigaa vinevaaLLam.
utterances.english_gloss: Every evening our grandfather sits on the verandah and tells stories from his childhood, and all of us listen together with interest.
utterances.notes: ~30 syllables, multiple clauses — tests prosody, breath control, long-form coherence.
